title: Ride Safe
detail: Your safety and the safety of those around you always come first. Wear proper riding gear, follow traffic rules, maintain safe speeds, and never ride beyond your skill or comfort level.

title: Ride at Your Own Pace
detail: A group ride is not a race. Never push yourself to keep up with another rider. Ride at a pace you're comfortable with and enjoy the journey. The group will regroup at important junctions and pre-planned stops.

title: Look Out for Each Other
detail: Keep an eye on your fellow riders, especially at turns and junctions. If you notice someone missing, facing a breakdown, or needing assistance, communicate with the group and make sure no rider is left behind.

title: Keep the Group Together
detail: Avoid unnecessary stops or route deviations without informing the group. If you need to stop, change your route, or leave the ride early, make sure the group is informed.

title: Be Prepared
detail: Start every ride with a roadworthy motorcycle and enough fuel. Carry essential documents, basic tools, necessary medicines, rain protection, and any other essentials mentioned in the trip checklist.
